blended.narrative: Showdown Montana is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 10 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 3,153 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 8.4" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 44".
